File.title: File
File.description: A physical file in the office

fileIdNo.description: The ID number of the file

company.description: The company associated with the file

location.description: Where the file is stored in the office

checkedOutBy.description: UID of the user who checked out the file

checkedOutByName.description: Display name of the user who checked out the file

activeHistoryId.description: ID of the current active history record

fileMonitor.description: The name of the person monitoring/uploading the file

fileMonitorId.description: The email ID of the person monitoring/uploading the file

value.description: The value of the filter option

Attachment.title: Attachment
Attachment.description: An uploaded document or image for a file

type.description: The MIME type of the attachment

uploadedBy.description: UID of the user who uploaded the attachment

uploadedByName.description: Display name of the user who uploaded the attachment

CheckoutHistory.title: Checkout History
CheckoutHistory.description: A record of a file being checked out and returned

userId.description: UID of the user who checked out the file

userName.description: Display name of the user who checked out the file

checkoutTimestamp.description: When the file was checked out

returnedBy.description: UID of the user who returned the file

returnedByName.description: Display name of the user who returned the file

files/{fileId}/attachments.description: Subcollection of attachments for a file

files/{fileId}/history.description: Subcollection of checkout history for a file

users.description: Collection of users and their roles
